description_long: This is a robust, rectangular shelving unit with two main horizontal shelves supported by four sturdy vertical legs. The structure appears to be made primarily of metal, with some wooden or composite elements at the base of the legs, likely for stability or aesthetic contrast. The shelves are open on all sides, allowing for easy access and visibility of stored items. The design is utilitarian and modern, suitable for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or garages. The surfaces are flat and smooth, providing ample space for storage or display. There are no visible doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its open-shelf functionality.
description: A sturdy, open metal shelving unit with two flat shelves and exposed supports, suitable for urban outdoor use. The design is modern and functional, with no enclosed compartments.
description_view_0: Front view shows two open shelves with four supporting legs and a clear, accessible structure.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the shelves and the thickness of the supporting legs.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the open design and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the shelf depth and support structure.
